v.s: Pick an ID format for the job, then import only that generator.

\x3Csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" class=\"lucide lucide-sparkles\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\x3Cpath d=\"M11.017 2.814a1 1 0 0 1 1.966 0l1.051 5.558a2 2 0 0 0 1.594 1.594l5.558 1.051a1 1 0 0 1 0 1.966l-5.558 1.051a2 2 0 0 0-1.594 1.594l-1.051 5.558a1 1 0 0 1-1.966 0l-1.051-5.558a2 2 0 0 0-1.594-1.594l-5.558-1.051a1 1 0 0 1 0-1.966l5.558-1.051a2 2 0 0 0 1.594-1.594z\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M20 2v4\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M22 4h-4\">\x3C/path>\x3Ccircle cx=\"4\" cy=\"20\" r=\"2\">\x3C/circle>\x3C/svg>
One install, every ID strategy. Import the generator your application needs.
Choose for the system boundary, not the trend.

\x3Csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" class=\"lucide lucide-scan-line\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\x3Cpath d=\"M3 7V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M17 3h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M21 17v2a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-2\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M7 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-2\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M7 12h10\">\x3C/path>\x3C/svg>
Runnable starting points for Hono, Drizzle ORM v1, and Effect v4.

\x3Csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" class=\"lucide lucide-blocks\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\x3Cpath d=\"M10 22V7a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H2\">\x3C/path>\x3Crect x=\"14\" y=\"2\" width=\"8\" height=\"8\" rx=\"1\">\x3C/rect>\x3C/svg>
Where uniku beats npm alternatives, where it does not, and what each import weighs.

\x3Csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" class=\"lucide lucide-gauge\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\x3Cpath d=\"m12 14 4-4\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"M3.34 19a10 10 0 1 1 17.32 0\">\x3C/path>\x3C/svg>
Generate, inspect, and validate IDs from the terminal.

\x3Csvg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" class=\"lucide lucide-terminal\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\x3Cpath d=\"M12 19h8\">\x3C/path>\x3Cpath d=\"m4 17 6-6-6-6\">\x3C/path>\x3C/svg>
Keep familiar formats while moving to direct, portable imports.

Prepare for the v1 entry-point contract without changing identifier data.
